metadata.name: confidential_desk
metadata.description: Confidential Lending Desk — private positions on PER, settlement on base

instructions.name: bootstrap_desk_borrow_mint_espl
docs: Base-only: ESPL bootstrap for the borrow mint / pool vault (desk PDA is off-curve; JS `delegateSpl` cannot do this).

instructions.name: bootstrap_desk_lp_mint_espl
docs: Base-only: ESPL bootstrap for the LP mint (enables `MintTo` on PER for that mint).

accounts.name: desk
docs: Read-only on PER: desk config is mirrored from base; only delegated PDAs + token accounts are writable.

accounts.name: desk
docs: Read-only on PER: desk config mirror (same as `DepositLiquidity`).

fields.name: lp_total_minted
docs: Mirrors LP supply on PER for share math.

fields.name: deposit_amount
docs: USDC atoms notionally supplied (mirrors vault share accounting on PER).
